texto: You don't live in the past
autor: you take a sledgehammer to it to see what stands so that you can build on it.
explicacao: Citação de you take a sledgehammer to it to see what stands so that you can build on it. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You don't live in the past” articula reflexao, samuel-l-drew em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
